title.en: And Ye Tian actually cultivated this holy techn...

content.en:
"This is the Holy Technique Imperial Body!"

The Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor could see it at a glance, because among the eight holy skills Ye Tian selected, there was the imperial body technique.

This is an amplification type holy skill, and the cultivation difficulty is very high.

For example, he also cultivated the holy technique of the Imperial Body, and it took a long time to cultivate it to the entry level, and now he can only reach the Dacheng realm.

And Ye Tian actually cultivated this holy technique to the realm of Dacheng!

"No wonder he is sure to defeat the Light-clothed Holy Maiden, with the increase of the Holy Skill of the Imperial Body, both the Golden Silk Holy Technique and the Holy Armor Holy Technique can burst out with the power of the Perfection Realm. It's just that it's hard to say who will win and who will lose now!"

Fire Emblem War Ancestor said secretly.

After all, the Light-clothed Holy Maiden is also a holy skill of the two consummation realms, although Ye Tian's Imperial Body Holy Technique can also increase his own strength, speed, spirit, and other aspects, but the Holy Skill of Sword Star is more powerful than the Golden Silk Holy Skill.

It is also a consummation realm, and it is also a relatively powerful sword star.

Therefore, on the whole, Ye Tian only had a slight advantage.

This small advantage is nothing in such a battle, and one mistake will be lost.

"I didn't expect you to master the holy technique of the imperial body, I have to say, in terms of talent, I am not your opponent, if you really grow up, I will definitely not be able to beat you. It's a pity that you haven't perfected any of your holy skills. Even if you only need to complete a holy skill, I will immediately admit defeat!"

The light-clothed saint said.

Ye Tian was also very helpless, he wanted to cultivate a holy technique to the consummation realm, but it was too late!

The consummation of the Holy Technique is very difficult and takes a long time.

How long has it been since he broke through to the Realm of Unity?

If it weren't for the resources of the Battle Gate, he would not have reached the consummation realm of the Unified Realm now!

Soon, Ye Tian fought with the light-clothed saintess.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian used the Golden Silk Saint Technique again and again, and the lightly-clothed Saint Maiden used the Sword Star again and again.

But soon, they switched to forbidden Dao fighting.

Because the Holy Technique consumes a lot of power, if you keep using it, I'm afraid that both of you won't be able to hold it up, and your strength will be exhausted.

After a while, Ye Tian was ready to use another holy skill, otherwise if he was not careful, he would still lose.

"Which holy technique should I use?"

Ye Tian pondered.

Streamer?Extreme?Five Elements Ban?Or is it Immortality, Suppression God?

"With the god of town, there is no way to use many treasures in the tower of the war realm, the soul of the light-clothed saintess is absolutely not blessed by treasures, and the soul of the god of the town is aimed at the soul, and it can definitely hit her soul in an instant, even if it can't be hit hard, hurt her soul, or make her fall into a sluggish state, I can easily win!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

During the battle, Ye Tian instantly performed the Suppression Divine Technique!

A terrifying soul attack formed a golden bell, directly shaking the soul of the lightly-clothed saintess.

Rumble!!!!

The light-clothed saintess's soul was shattered, and the whole person instantly fell into a stupor.

If the soul is not severely damaged, the light-clothed saintess can still urge the Tsing Yi Holy Technique with all her might.

But now, although her Tsing Yi Holy Technique is still running automatically, her control strength has dropped greatly, and her power has naturally dropped greatly.

At this moment, Ye Tian decisively performed the Golden Silk Saint Technique.

Poof!!!

The Golden Silk Sacred Technique sliced through the body of the Light-clothed Saintess, and hit her hard with a single blow.

The soul is bad, the body is bad!

The combat power of the light-clothed saintess suddenly decreased a lot, and she couldn't stop Ye Tian at all.

After a few moves, the light-clothed saintess was killed, and her body reunited outside the ring.

The light-clothed saintess was defeated, and Ye Tian won the victory!

This happened so fast!

Just now, the two were evenly matched, and in the blink of an eye, the light-clothed saintess was defeated, and Ye Tian won the victory!

"How so?"

Many domain ancestors didn't understand it, and they were dumbfounded.

Why was it that all of a sudden, the Holy Maiden in Tsing Yi was sluggish, and was severely injured by Ye Tian's Golden Silk Saint Technique?

What happened at that moment?

"You actually know how to ??? soul holy technique"

The light-clothed saint's pupils shrank sharply and said in shock.

Soul Sacred Technique!!

This is an incomparably rare holy skill, how terrifying the power is, even if it is a powerful demon, he is afraid of soul attacks!

What's more, this time in the holy war, it is not allowed to carry any secret treasures, and the soul has almost no protection, so it can only rely on some soul secret techniques.

A saint like the light-clothed saint doesn't know the soul holy technique, only the soul forbidden dao technique, but where can the forbidden dao technique resist the soul holy technique?

"It's the Soul Saint Technique Suppression God!"

The Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor recognized it, and some of the Invincible Domain Ancestors also recognized it.

This soul holy technique is very difficult to cultivate, and Ye Tian obviously has a soul holy endowment.

Now, Ye Tian has performed the four holy skills all of a sudden, I am afraid that he has the four holy endowments!

What's more, Ye Tian asked for the eight holy skills of the Battle Gate, and none of the eight holy skills were of the same type.

If Ye Tian knew the Eight Great Divine Skills, wouldn't it prove that Ye Tian had the Eight Great Holy Endowments?

"This ......"

The Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor couldn't believe this speculation, but if there were no Eight Great Saint Endowments, why did Ye Tian want those Eight Great Saint Skills?

If it is true, then Ye Tian is too demonic.

"Could it be that he is the son of two Ancestors, and the Ancestors cultivated him with all their might, allowing him to possess the Eight Great Divine Endowments?"

Fire Emblem War Ancestor guessed.

The Battle Gate also has an ancestor, and there is only one ancestor.

In fact, each of the Ten Holy Gates has an ancestor.

The reason why the Ten Holy Gates are called Holy Gates is because of the existence of ancestors, but few people in the outside world know about them.

The Holy Land has one or more Supreme Domain Ancestors, and if there is no Supreme Domain Ancestor in charge, the Holy Land will be disqualified.

The sect has an invincible domain ancestor in charge, and only then can a sect be established.

The city-level forces have the strongest domain ancestor.

This is the division of the forces of the Dark Sanctuary!

There were only ten Ancestors in the entire Dark Sanctuary, so the Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor had very little understanding of the Ancestor level.

"Maybe even the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws doesn't know that he is the heir of the First Ancestor, so he doesn't have the Holy Skill to join our battle gate!"

There are many plots in the mind of the Fire Emblem War Ancestor.

For example, the two ancient ancestors gave birth to the Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, threw him into a realm, and let him grow up slowly in a harsh environment.

If Ye Tian knew the thoughts of the Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor, he would definitely laugh wildly.

But at this moment, Ye Tian had indeed become the object of attention of countless domain ancestors, and everyone was extremely curious about him.

Eternal and Immortal Holy Body, the Four Great Sacred Techniques.

This kind of strength is extremely powerful among the triple overlimiters.

A saint-endowed person like the Zilin Holy Son can barely be regarded as a triple overlimiter, the light-clothed holy son can be regarded as a relatively powerful triple overlimiter, and Ye Tian is definitely a top-tier triple overlimiter.

Ye Tian showed such a strong strength, no one else dared to challenge him, that was looking for abuse.

As a result, the other saints challenged each other for the third, fourth, fifth, sixth, and seventh positions.

The first belongs to Ye Tian, and the second belongs to the light-clothed saintess.

There is no doubt about that!
